import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut current = ""
  mut in_num = false
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        if in_num
          match string.parse_int(current)
          when Some(v)
            result = list.push(result, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          current = ""
          in_num = false
        end
      else
        current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
        in_num = true
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_num
    match string.parse_int(current)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn sort_desc(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut remaining = xs
  while remaining.len() > 0
    let m0 = match remaining.get(0)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    mut max_val = m0
    mut max_idx = 0
    mut i = 1
    let n = remaining.len()
    while i < n
      let v = match remaining.get(i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      if v > max_val
        max_val = v
        max_idx = i
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    result = list.push(result, max_val)
    mut new_remaining: List<Int> = []
    mut j = 0
    while j < n
      if j != max_idx
        let v = match remaining.get(j)
        when Some(x)
          x
        when None
          0
        end
        new_remaining = list.push(new_remaining, v)
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    remaining = new_remaining
  end
  result
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let nums = parse_ints(line1)
let k = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
when Some(v)
  v
when None
  0
end

let sorted = sort_desc(nums)
let take = if k < sorted.len()
  k
else
  sorted.len()
end

mut output = ""
mut i = 0
while i < take
  let v = match sorted.get(i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if i == 0
    output = "#{v}"
  else
    output = "#{output} #{v}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println(output)
